title: ULTRAKILL Firecharges
description: Replaces the 'fire_charge' texture with the projectile from ULTRAKILL
body:
![ultrakill projectile flaying towards camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d52537c9d389389d86e2737114fb54f75074b9_0.webp)
# HAVE YOU WANTED TO PARRY LIKE A REAL MACHINE???
**Well have i got the pack for you.** | Have the time of your life when you parry Ghasts or deflect multi-shots from Blazes

### For the full experience
You should install [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective) _(A Quilt based mod)_ and enable the ULTRAKILL toggle in settings either via commands or using a mod manager (ex. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)) under 'Extras' catagory
